name: Montgomery Department of Public Health
description: Provides immunizations, disease surveillance, WIC nutrition services, environmental health inspections, and health education programs. Serves the River Region with comprehensive preventive care.

name: Baptist Medical Center South
description: Major regional hospital with 400+ beds. Emergency department, trauma center, cardiac care, cancer treatment, and surgical services. One of Montgomery's largest employers.

name: Jackson Hospital
description: Full-service community hospital with 344 beds. Offers emergency care, birthing center, orthopedic services, rehabilitation, and outpatient clinics across Montgomery.

name: Community Health Centers
description: Network of federally qualified health centers providing primary care, dental, behavioral health, and pharmacy services to underserved populations. Sliding fee scale available.

name: Air Quality Index - Montgomery
description: Montgomery generally maintains Good to Moderate air quality. Industrial areas near west Montgomery may occasionally show elevated PM2.5 levels. Real-time monitoring at 3 stations.

name: Mental Health Resources
description: Montgomery Area Mental Health Authority (MAMHA) provides crisis intervention, outpatient counseling, substance abuse treatment, and residential services. Crisis hotline available 24/7.
